title: deschampsia hookeriana
intro: Deschampsia hookeriana, also known as Hooker's hair grass or Hooker's bent grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Deschampsia hookeriana include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's essential oil in aromatherapy.
